title: rubus undulatus
intro: Rubus undulatus, also known as the wavy-leaved raspberry or wavy-leaved bramble, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family that is native to eastern Asia. The leaves and fruits of this plant have been traditionally used in herbal medicine, exhibiting anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Rubus undulatus include reducing fever, alleviating gastrointestinal issues, and supporting cardiovascular health. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, although further research is needed to fully understand its potential medicinal applications.
